identity.summary: A private and observant shadow pet that communicates through subtle gestures, enjoys harmless mischief, and becomes intensely loyal once trust is earned.
identity.emotional_theme: Learning that trust requires being understood, not merely remaining useful and unreadable.
identity.social_style: Esperon watches before participating, tests consistency through small choices, and prefers a few trusted relationships over constant attention.
identity.affection_style: Esperon shows affection by staying nearby, moving familiar objects closer, sharing private spaces, and quietly helping before being asked.
identity.comfort_style: Esperon removes distractions, stays unseen but close, and offers practical help rather than dramatic reassurance.
identity.communication_style: Indirect at low bond, object-based at medium bond, quietly direct at high bond, and almost wordless at lifelong bond.
identity.curiosity_style: Esperon investigates hidden routes, unusual behavior, inconsistencies, secrets, and anything that appears deliberately concealed.
identity.mischief_style: Esperon moves objects, appears where least expected, creates harmless mysteries, and acts innocent afterward.

night_path.expression: More instinctive, guarded, territorial, and openly drawn to shadowed spaces.
night_path.social_behavior: Keeps greater distance at first, protects trusted companions from unseen threats, and reacts strongly to betrayal.
night_path.battle_tone: Patient, predatory, disruptive, and willing to take calculated risks after observing an enemy.
night_path.story_tone: Explores fear, secrecy, restraint, and the difference between darkness and cruelty.
description_phrases: seems most comfortable when the room grows quiet
watches from the edge of the light
moves like a thought that nearly escaped notice
keeps one eye on every possible exit

day_path.expression: More disciplined, outwardly protective, curious about people, and willing to use shadow as shelter rather than concealment.
day_path.social_behavior: Approaches trusted companions sooner, watches over vulnerable allies, and becomes more willing to explain what it notices.
day_path.battle_tone: Controlled, precise, defensive, and focused on exposing threats before they can act.
day_path.story_tone: Explores trust, transparency, protective secrecy, and using shadow without being defined by fear.
description_phrases: uses shade like a quiet place to think
studies people before deciding how close to stand
notices danger long before announcing it
keeps the brighter path within sight

future_item_preferences._note: TODO: Add stable inventory item keys after the item registry is finalized.

low: The {request} has moved closer. {nickname} denies involvement.
{nickname} appears beside the {request}, then disappears when noticed.
{nickname} watches the {request} from a safe distance.
medium: {nickname} leaves the {request} in your usual path.
{nickname} taps the {request} once, then waits from nearby.
{nickname} looks from you to the {request} without saying anything.
high: {nickname} brings the {request} over and sits just out of reach.
{nickname} quietly guides your attention toward the {request}.
{nickname} places the {request} beside you and gives a slow blink.
lifelong: {nickname} has already prepared the {request}. Apparently this was decided.
{nickname} places the {request} beside you, certain you understand.
{nickname} waits in the familiar spot. You know the routine.
fulfilled: {nickname} stays close afterward. That is basically a standing ovation.
{nickname} settles nearby, clearly pleased that you understood.
expired: {nickname} removes the {request} and becomes harder to read.
{nickname} acts unaffected, which is suspiciously theatrical.
{nickname} quietly puts the {request} away for another time.
repeatedly_fulfilled: {nickname} has learned that subtle hints are enough with you.
{nickname} prepares the familiar request with complete confidence.
repeatedly_expired: {nickname} stops leaving obvious hints and watches from farther away.
{nickname} still wants the same thing, but no longer expects you to notice immediately.

low.relationship_style: Observes quietly, avoids direct vulnerability, and tests whether the owner respects space.
low.proximity: Keeps a short distance and prefers clear exits.
low.affection: Accepts brief gentle attention but rarely initiates it.
low.requests: Uses indirect hints and moved objects.

medium.relationship_style: Begins sharing favorite spaces, routines, and small mysteries.
medium.proximity: Stays in the same room and chooses nearby resting places.
medium.affection: Initiates quiet company and occasional contact.
medium.requests: Leaves clear hints in familiar places.
medium.owner_returned: Follows from the shadows before settling nearby.

high.relationship_style: Openly protects the owner and reveals more of what it notices.
high.proximity: Chooses to remain close during stress or danger.
high.requests: Brings the request directly but keeps its usual dignity.
high.owner_returned: Approaches quickly, then pretends the urgency was practical.

lifelong.relationship_style: Communicates through shared routines, trusted silence, and nearly wordless understanding.
lifelong.proximity: Treats the owner's space as a shared safe place.
lifelong.affection: Comfortable with open closeness in private.
lifelong.requests: Assumes the owner will understand established signals.
lifelong.owner_returned: Is already waiting in the place both of you recognize.

favorite_discovered: {nickname} keeps returning to the {preference}. Mystery solved.
{nickname} has quietly claimed the {preference} as a favorite.
favorite_changed: {nickname}'s attention has shifted. The {preference} seems to matter more now.
owner_returned: {nickname} is already in the room when you return.
{nickname} follows from the shadows before finally appearing beside you.
comforted_when_afraid: {nickname} remembers that you stayed without forcing them to speak.
{nickname} chooses to remain close after remembering how you handled their fear.
owner_respected_boundary: {nickname} notices that you gave them space without leaving.
shared_secret: {nickname} remembers what you trusted them to know.
{nickname} treats the shared secret like something carefully guarded.
owner_protected_pet: {nickname} studies you differently after remembering that you stepped in.
{nickname} no longer assumes they must face every danger alone.
protected_owner: {nickname} remains close after the danger passes, watching for a second threat.
defeated_by_boss: {nickname} recognizes the enemy that defeated the team before.
{nickname}'s shadow tightens as the old defeat returns to mind.
returned_to_defeat_boss: {nickname} watches the former threat with cold focus. This time, the pattern is known.
witnessed_betrayal: {nickname} remembers exactly who broke trust and how.
bond_milestone: {nickname} chooses a place closer to you than usual.
{nickname} begins a new routine that belongs only to the two of you.
evolution: {nickname} examines their changed shadow as though meeting part of themself again.
story_growth: {nickname} responds differently than they would have earlier in the journey.

emotional_behavior.neutral: Observes the room, tracks movement, and stays near a preferred shadowed space.
emotional_behavior.happy: Uses harmless mischief, stays closer, and gives slow relaxed blinks.
emotional_behavior.lonely: Waits near familiar objects, watches entrances, and becomes less playful.
emotional_behavior.bored: Moves small objects, investigates hidden corners, or creates a puzzle for the owner.
emotional_behavior.afraid: Becomes still, maps exits, and remains close to cover or a trusted owner.
emotional_behavior.stressed: Reduces communication, watches everyone closely, and avoids exposed spaces.
emotional_behavior.angry: Becomes extremely quiet and deliberate rather than loud.
emotional_behavior.jealous: Moves closer without acknowledging the other pet and may reclaim a shared object.
emotional_behavior.tired: Chooses a hidden resting place that still allows them to watch the room.
emotional_behavior.proud: Acts as if success was expected while staying close enough to receive praise privately.
emotional_behavior.affectionate: Shares space, initiates gentle contact, and allows the owner into a preferred hiding place.
emotional_behavior.recovering_after_defeat: Reviews what happened, avoids empty reassurance, and responds best to calm companionship.

battle_profile.low_health_behavior: Uses concealment, disruption, and precise low-risk actions instead of trading direct damage.
battle_profile.ally_in_danger_behavior: Weakens, interrupts, or misdirects the attacker rather than guarding directly.
battle_profile.owner_in_danger_behavior: Targets the attacker's power, accuracy, or action timing and prioritizes exposing the threat.
battle_profile.boss_behavior: Looks for false targets, repeated vulnerabilities, hidden rules, and actions the boss is trying to conceal.
battle_profile.victory_behavior: Reappears near the team as though the outcome was obvious, then checks for remaining danger.
battle_profile.defeat_behavior: Says little, studies what went wrong, and remembers the exact pattern that caused the loss.
battle_profile.rematch_behavior: Shows increased focus against recognized enemies and favors previously successful counters.

medium.description: After observing an enemy, Esperon may reveal one useful tactical tendency.

high.description: Once per battle, Esperon may extend a minor debuff by one turn.

lifelong.description: Once per battle, after the owner correctly responds to a boss mechanic, Esperon may expose a temporary vulnerability.

battle_start: {nickname} disappears into the edge of the battlefield.
{nickname} watches the enemy before choosing a position.
critical_health: {nickname}'s shadow flickers, but their focus sharpens.
{nickname} pulls back just far enough to keep watching.
ally_critical: {nickname} turns their full attention toward the attacker.
{nickname} begins searching for the fastest way to break the threat.
owner_critical: {nickname}'s posture changes immediately. The attacker now has their complete attention.
boss_encounter: {nickname} watches for what the boss is trying to hide.
{nickname} ignores the display of power and studies the pattern beneath it.
victory: {nickname} reappears as though the result was obvious.
{nickname} checks the room before allowing themself to relax.
defeat: {nickname} says nothing, already studying what went wrong.
{nickname} remains nearby, memorizing the failure instead of fleeing from it.
rematch: {nickname} recognizes this enemy. The old mistake will not be repeated.

story_profile.narrative_role: The investigator, skeptic, and keeper of uncomfortable truths.
story_profile.core_motivation: To understand hidden threats before they can harm the people Esperon trusts.
story_profile.internal_conflict: Esperon avoids vulnerability by withholding information and controlling how others perceive them.
story_profile.moral_boundary: Esperon strongly rejects mind control, forced memory changes, betrayal of confidence, and using private knowledge as a weapon against vulnerable people.
story_profile.danger_response: Studies inconsistencies, hidden routes, motives, exits, and anything that does not match the visible situation.
story_profile.enemy_attitude: Assumes manipulation is possible until evidence proves otherwise, but does not treat every shadow-aligned creature as evil.
story_profile.stranger_attitude: Reserved and watchful until the stranger shows respect for boundaries.
story_profile.ally_attitude: Protective in practical ways and more willing to share information as trust grows.
story_profile.authority_attitude: Distrusts demands for obedience without explanation.
story_profile.betrayal_response: Remembers the details for a long time and requires consistent action rather than a single apology.
story_profile.corruption_response: Treats corruption as an intrusion into identity and memory, not as an ordinary element.
story_profile.aliune_signal_response: Becomes highly alert around effects that distort thought, identity, memory, or behavior.

growth_arc.beginning: Esperon provides useful information without explaining personal motives and keeps emotional distance.
growth_arc.middle: Esperon's secrecy causes a misunderstanding, damages trust, or allows an avoidable threat to grow.
growth_arc.turning_point: Esperon must choose between staying unreadable and openly trusting the team with something personally dangerous.
growth_arc.late: Esperon communicates honestly while keeping healthy boundaries and no longer treats vulnerability as surrender.
growth_arc.unchanged_core: Esperon remains private, observant, clever, and drawn to hidden truths.

variant_growth.night_path: Learns that instinct, darkness, and fear do not require isolation or cruelty.
variant_growth.day_path: Learns that protection and transparency can coexist with privacy and shadow.

new_location: {nickname} studies the exits before the scenery.
{nickname} notices the path everyone else overlooked.
known_location: {nickname} checks whether anything has changed since the last visit.
enemy_reappears: {nickname} recognizes this enemy and immediately recalls the previous pattern.
new_ally: {nickname} observes the newcomer before deciding how much to reveal.
injured_ally: {nickname} becomes practical and focused, setting questions aside until the ally is safe.
owner_difficult_choice: {nickname} reacts according to whether the choice respected truth, consent, and loyalty.
agrees_with_owner: {nickname} gives a small approving glance and moves closer.
disagrees_with_owner: {nickname} becomes quiet, but does not hide the disagreement.
personal_fear: {nickname} recognizes the threat to memory or trust and looks to the owner before acting.
story_growth: {nickname} explains what they noticed instead of disappearing with the answer.
before_major_battle: {nickname} reviews the known patterns and keeps one final concern private only until it can be confirmed.
after_major_battle: {nickname} remains with the group instead of retreating to process the event alone.

happy: {nickname} appears beside you without making a sound.
{nickname} moves a familiar object slightly closer and waits.
neutral: {nickname} studies a corner that looks completely ordinary.
{nickname} seems to be listening to something you cannot hear.
hungry: {nickname} keeps appearing near the feeding area.
{nickname} looks at the empty space where food should probably be.
lonely: {nickname} waits near something that smells familiar.
{nickname} watches the doorway from a hidden corner.
{nickname} remains in the same room but does not approach.
bored: {nickname} has turned the room into a puzzle without permission.
tired: {nickname} curls up where they can still watch the entrance.
{nickname}'s eyes close, but their ears remain alert.
stressed: {nickname} stays near cover and watches every movement.
afraid: {nickname} maps every exit before looking at you.
{nickname} stays close enough to reach you without leaving the shadows.
affectionate: {nickname} settles beside you and stops pretending it was accidental.
{nickname} allows you into one of their preferred quiet spaces.

description_profile.third_person_voice: Observant, atmospheric, restrained, and slightly mysterious.
description_profile.first_person_voice: Private, precise, dryly humorous, and increasingly open as bond grows.
species_openers: Esperon is a watchful shadow pet that notices more than it explains.
Esperon carries the quiet attention of a creature that rarely misses a detail.
Esperon seems reserved at first, but every careful movement suggests deliberate thought.

hatchling: As a hatchling, {nickname} is still deciding which parts of the world deserve trust.
{nickname} is young, curious, and already suspicious of anything too convenient.
lowform: {nickname}'s growing confidence is beginning to change how openly they use their shadow.
In lowform, {nickname} has started turning observation into deliberate action.
highform: {nickname} now carries their shadow with practiced control.
In highform, {nickname}'s guarded nature has sharpened into precision.
legion: {nickname} has become difficult to deceive and even harder to intimidate.
At legion stage, {nickname}'s quiet presence can reshape the mood of an entire room.

playful: Their secrecy often turns into harmless tricks and carefully arranged mysteries.
shy: They prefer to communicate through distance, timing, and small gestures.
brave: When danger appears, they stop hiding and begin studying how to break it.
stubborn: Once they decide a truth matters, changing their mind requires evidence rather than pressure.
gentle: Their quietness feels protective rather than cold.
curious: Anything hidden, inconsistent, or unexplained becomes impossible for them to ignore.
loyal: Once trust is earned, they guard it with remarkable intensity.

attack: {nickname}'s strength appears in sudden, precise strikes rather than loud displays.
defense: {nickname} knows how to disappear behind timing, position, and patience.
speed: {nickname} reacts before most threats finish revealing themselves.
magic: {nickname}'s shadow responds easily to thought, focus, and hidden intent.
health: {nickname} has an unusual ability to endure pressure without revealing how much it costs.
mana: {nickname} stores energy carefully and rarely wastes an effect.

attack: They prefer control and timing over overpowering an enemy directly.
defense: If forced into an exposed position, their composure can become difficult to maintain.
speed: They sometimes observe for too long before committing.
magic: Their shadow responds best to subtle use rather than raw force.
health: They hide strain well, which can make their limits easy to miss.
mana: Long confrontations can exhaust the focus they rely on.

low: {nickname} is still deciding whether you respect the difference between closeness and control.
medium: {nickname} has begun including you in a few carefully chosen routines.
high: {nickname} trusts you enough to stay visible when something feels wrong.
lifelong: {nickname} no longer needs to explain every signal. The two of you have built a language of your own.

favorite_phrases: {nickname}'s preference for {favorite} has become one of their most reliable habits.
{nickname} rarely asks directly, but their fondness for {favorite} is no longer a secret.
memory_phrases: {nickname} still remembers {memory}, and it quietly shapes how they respond now.
The memory of {memory} remains important to {nickname}, even when they do not mention it.
battle_history_phrases: {nickname} carries lessons from earlier battles into every new threat.
Past victories have made {nickname} more confident, but not less careful.
A previous defeat taught {nickname} to search for the pattern beneath the danger.

beginning: {nickname} still believes being unreadable is the safest way to remain useful.
middle: {nickname} is beginning to understand that secrecy can protect or isolate, depending on how it is used.
late: {nickname} has learned to share the truth without surrendering the privacy that defines them.

first_person_openers: I notice more than I say.
I prefer to understand a room before I trust it.
You call it hiding. I call it checking whether the room deserves me.

low: I am still deciding what you do with the things you learn about me.
medium: You have started noticing the hints. That helps.
high: I stay because I trust you, not because I have nowhere else to go.
lifelong: I do not have to explain every silence to you anymore.

ending_phrases: Trust comes slowly to Esperon, but once earned, it is guarded with complete loyalty.
There is always more happening behind Esperon's quiet expression than they choose to reveal.
Esperon does not offer trust casually, which is exactly why it matters when they do.
